query:
SELECT 
  id, leadName, leadPhone, stage, createdAt, updatedAt,
  JSON_LENGTH(messageHistory) as msgCount,
  JSON_EXTRACT(messageHistory, '$[last]') as lastMsg,
  SUBSTRING(messageHistory, -500) as msgTail
FROM conversation_sessions
WHERE leadName LIKE '%Thelma%' OR leadPhone LIKE '%703%843%'
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
